ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date */,
  "date_value" TEXT /* Date value in the format specified by date_type */,
  "date_type" TEXT /* Type of date format (e.g., LOCAL_DATE, STRING) */,
  "date_granularity" TEXT /* Granularity of the date (e.g., year, month, day) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the date was inserted or updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the date was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datetimes" (
  "datetime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date and time */,
  "datetime_value" TEXT /* Date and time value in the format specified by datetime_type */,
  "datetime_type" TEXT /* Type of date and time format (e.g., LOCAL_DATE_TIME, INSTANT) */,
  "precision" TEXT /* Level of precision for the date and time (e.g., seconds, milliseconds, microseconds) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the date and time was inserted or updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the date and time was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("datetime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datetimes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timestamps" (
  "timestamp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timestamp */,
  "timestamp_value" TEXT /* Timestamp value in the format specified by timestamp_type */,
  "timestamp_type" TEXT /* Type of timestamp format (e.g., INSTANT) */,
  "precision" TEXT /* Level of precision for the timestamp (e.g., seconds, milliseconds, microseconds) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the timestamp was inserted or updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the timestamp */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the timestamp was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timestamps_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "date_time_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date used in the comparison */,
  "datetime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date and time used in the comparison */,
  "timestamp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timestamp used in the comparison */,
  "comparison_result" TEXT /* Result of the comparison (e.g., 'earlier', 'later', 'equal') */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comparison */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comparison was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_date_time_comparisons_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "date_time_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date used in the conversion */,
  "datetime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date and time used in the conversion */,
  "timestamp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timestamp used in the conversion */,
  "conversion_result" TEXT /* Result of the conversion (e.g., 'success', 'failure') */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the conversion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the conversion was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_date_time_conversions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'analyst', 'administrator') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date accessed */,
  "datetime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date and time accessed */,
  "timestamp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timestamp accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "date_time_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "date_type" TEXT /* Type of date format (e.g., LOCAL_DATE, STRING) */,
  "datetime_type" TEXT /* Type of date and time format (e.g., LOCAL_DATE_TIME, INSTANT) */,
  "timestamp_type" TEXT /* Type of timestamp format (e.g., INSTANT) */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule for the date and time format (e.g., 'YYYY-MM-DD', 'HH:mm:ss') */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the validation rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the validation rule was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_date_time_validations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "date_time_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date and time format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the date and time format (e.g., 'LOCAL_DATE', 'LOCAL_DATE_TIME') */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Description of the date and time format (e.g., 'Date in the format YYYY-MM-DD', 'Date and time in the format YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss') */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the date and time format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the date and time format was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_date_time_formats_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "date_time_granularities" (
  "granularity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each granularity */,
  "granularity_name" TEXT /* Name of the granularity (e.g., 'year', 'month', 'day') */,
  "granularity_description" TEXT /* Description of the granularity (e.g., 'Year level granularity', 'Month level granularity') */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the granularity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the granularity was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("granularity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_date_time_granularities_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "date_time_precisions" (
  "precision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precision */,
  "precision_name" TEXT /* Name of the precision (e.g., 'seconds', 'milliseconds', 'microseconds') */,
  "precision_description" TEXT /* Description of the precision (e.g., 'Second level precision', 'Millisecond level precision') */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the precision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the precision was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_date_time_precisions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
